'''竏嗅-l-n-l''' ('''kakalneloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:majorate|majorate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-l-n-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:majorate|majorate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗅-l-n-l
|-
! Lemma
| kakalneloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== Subject agreement ===
''Object fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thikalneloko || jikalneloko || shikalneloko || kikalneloko
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthukalneloko || jujukalneloko || shushukalneloko || kukukalneloko
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thukalneloko || jukalneloko || shukalneloko || kukalneloko
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thukalneloko || jukalneloko || shukalneloko || kukalneloko
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thekalneloko || jekalneloko || shekalneloko || kekalneloko
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothokalneloko || jojokalneloko || shoshokalneloko || kokokalneloko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thokalneloko || jokalneloko || shokalneloko || kokalneloko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thokalneloko || jokalneloko || shokalneloko || kokalneloko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || kalneloko || kalneloko || kalneloko || kalneloko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || kalneloko || kalneloko || kalneloko || kalneloko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || kalneloko || kalneloko || kalneloko || kalneloko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || kalneloko || kalneloko || kalneloko || kalneloko
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thﾃｦkalneloko || jﾃｦkalneloko || shﾃｦkalneloko || kﾃｦkalneloko
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathakalneloko || jajakalneloko || shashakalneloko || kakakalneloko
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thakalneloko || jakalneloko || shakalneloko || kakalneloko
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thakalneloko || jakalneloko || shakalneloko || kakalneloko
|}
=== Object agreement ===
''Subject fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || shakalnelithi || shakalneliji || shakalnelishi || shakalneliki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || shakalneluthu || shakalneluju || shakalnelushu || shakalneluku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || shakalneluthu || shakalneluju || shakalnelushu || shakalneluku
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || shakalnelotho || shakalnelojo || shakalnelosho || shakalneloko
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || shakalnelothof || shakalnelojof || shakalneloshof || shakalnelokof
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || shakalnelﾃｯf || shakalnelﾃｯf || shakalnelﾃｯf || shakalnelﾃｯf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || shakalnelﾃｦthﾃｦ || shakalnelﾃｦjﾃｦ || shakalnelﾃｦshﾃｦ || shakalnelﾃｦkﾃｦ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || shakalnelatha || shakalnelaja || shakalnelasha || shakalnelaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || shakalnelatha || shakalnelaja || shakalnelasha || shakalnelaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || shakalnelathaf || shakalnelajaf || shakalnelashaf || shakalnelakaf
|}
